summary: Tested enhanced referral system with 5 reward tiers and 3 ways to earn points. All backend APIs (13/13 tests) passed. Frontend displays correctly on /referencement and /profil pages.
passed_tests: API GET /api/google-reviews/link - returns correct link https://g.page/r/CewlYHqUvuLyEAI/review
API GET /api/referrals/stats - returns total_points and points_breakdown correctly
API GET /api/google-reviews/me - returns user's Google review status
API GET /api/existing-clients/me - returns user's existing client verification status
API POST /api/google-reviews - submits Google review (duplicate rejection works)
API POST /api/existing-clients - submits existing client verification (duplicate rejection works)
API POST /api/referrals - creates new referral successfully
Points calculation verified: total_points = referrals + google_reviews + existing_clients
Tier progression logic verified: points_to_next_tier calculated correctly
/referencement page displays 5 tiers: Bronze(10pts/25$), Argent(20pts/50$), Or(40pts/100$), Platine(75pts/250$), VIP(100pts/Coffret VIP)
/referencement page displays 3 ways to earn: Référez(+1pt), Avis Google(+2pts), Client existant(+2pts)
/profil Points tab shows all 3 earning methods with status badges (Vérifié/En attente)
/profil shows total points (4) and progression to next tier (Bronze, 6 points needed)
/profil shows points breakdown: 0 Références, 2 Avis Google, 2 Client existant
Login flow works correctly with admin@test.com credentials
Session persistence works - profile page accessible after login
seed_data_creation: Admin user already has 4 points (2 from verified Google review + 2 from verified existing client)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced referral system fully tested. 5 tiers (Bronze/Argent/Or/Platine/VIP) and 3 earning methods (referral/google review/existing client) all working. Admin user has 4 points, needs 6 more for Bronze tier. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_referral_system.py with 13 comprehensive tests.
